name: Chili Bean Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound mixed vegetables (such as carrots, bell peppers, celery)
3 tablespoons red wine or 3 tablespoons tomato juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the kidney beans.
2. Drain and rinse well.
3. Bring to a boil in fresh water, then boil fast for 10 minutes.
4. Reduce heat and cook for 40 minutes, depending on the freshness of the beans (older beans will take longer).
5. Drain, reserving liquid for stock later.
6. Heat olive oil in a large pot and gently fry onion and garlic for a few minutes.
7. Add chopped vegetables, cooked beans, basil, and spices. Stir well and cook for 5 minutes.
8. Add tomatoes, tomato paste, bulgur wheat, and 1 pint of the stock. Bring to a boil, cover, reduce heat, and simmer gently for 30 minutes.
9. Add lemon juice and remaining seasonings (salt, pepper).
10. If necessary, add more stock.
11. Cook for a further 20 minutes.
12. Serve.
